ddls:
CREATE TABLE "weather_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data point */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the data was collected */,
  "month" INTEGER /* Month the data was collected */,
  "day" INTEGER /* Day the data was collected */,
  "hour" INTEGER /* Hour the data was collected */,
  "minute" INTEGER /* Minute the data was collected */,
  "clearsky_dhi" REAL /* Clearsky diffuse horizontal irradiance (DHI) */,
  "clearsky_dni" REAL /* Clearsky direct normal irradiance (DNI) */,
  "clearsky_ghi" REAL /* Clearsky global horizontal irradiance (GHI) */,
  "cloud_type" INTEGER /* Type of cloud cover (0-4) */,
  "dew_point" REAL /* Dew point temperature */,
  "temperature" REAL /* Air temperature */,
  "pressure" INTEGER /* Atmospheric pressure */,
  "relative_humidity" REAL /* Relative humidity */,
  "solar_zenith_angle" REAL /* Solar zenith angle */,
  "precipitable_water" REAL /* Precipitable water */,
  "wind_direction" REAL /* Wind direction */,
  "wind_speed" REAL /* Wind speed */,
  "fill_flag" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if data is filled or missing */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the location where the data was collected */,
  "station_id" INTEGER /* ID of the weather station that collected the data */,
  "data_version" INTEGER /* Version of the data */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the data (e.g., ground station, satellite) */,
  "quality_flag" TEXT /* Quality flag of the data (e.g., good, questionable, bad) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_data_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_data_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("station_id") REFERENCES weather_stations ("station_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_data_cloud_type FOREIGN KEY ("cloud_type") REFERENCES cloud_types ("cloud_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the location */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the location */,
  "altitude" REAL /* Altitude of the location */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Timezone of the location */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the location is situated */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region or state where the location is situated */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last update of the location details */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the data type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data type */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the data type */,
  "min_value" REAL /* Minimum possible value for the data type */,
  "max_value" REAL /* Maximum possible value for the data type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cloud_types" (
  "cloud_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cloud type */,
  "cloud_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the cloud type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the cloud type */,
  "icon" TEXT /* Path to an icon representing the cloud type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cloud_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weather_stations" (
  "station_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weather station */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the location where the station is located */,
  "station_name" TEXT /* Name of the weather station */,
  "station_type" TEXT /* Type of weather station (e.g., surface, satellite) */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date the station was installed */,
  "last_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the last maintenance */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the station (e.g., active, inactive, under maintenance) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("station_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_stations_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "measurements" (
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each measurement */,
  "station_id" INTEGER /* ID of the weather station that took the measurement */,
  "type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data type being measured */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the measurement */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of the measurement */,
  "measurement_date" TEXT /* Date and time the measurement was taken */,
  "quality_flag" TEXT /* Quality flag of the measurement */,
  "data_version" INTEGER /* Version of the measurement data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("measurement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_measurements_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("type_id") REFERENCES data_types ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_measurements_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("station_id") REFERENCES weather_stations ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed version of the user's password */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login date and time */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Last update of the user account */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the data */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the user's browser or application */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES weather_data ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_files" (
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data file */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset the file belongs to */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the data file */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the data file in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the file was uploaded */,
  "checksum" TEXT /* Checksum of the file for integrity verification */,
  "file_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the file type */,
  "data_version" INTEGER /* Version of the data file */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_files_file_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("file_type_id") REFERENCES file_types ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_files_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES weather_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "file_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each file type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the file type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the file type */,
  "mime_type" TEXT /* MIME type of the file */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user being granted permission */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data being accessed */,
  "permission_type" TEXT /* Type of permission (e.g., view, edit, delete) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the permission was granted */,
  "expires_at" TEXT /* Date and time the permission will expire */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permissions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permissions_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES weather_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the team */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the team was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Last update of the team details */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "team_members" (
  "member_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team member */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the user belongs to */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user within the team (e.g., leader, member) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("member_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_members_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_members_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_requests" (
  "request_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data request */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team making the request */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data being requested */,
  "request_date" TEXT /* Date the request was made */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the request (e.g., pending, approved, rejected) */,
  "request_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the data request */,
  "approved_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who approved the request */,
  "approved_date" TEXT /* Date the request was approved */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("request_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_requests_approved_by FOREIGN KEY ("approved_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_requests_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_requests_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES weather_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_providers" (
  "provider_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data provider */,
  "provider_name" TEXT /* Name of the data provider */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data provider */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email of the data provider */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the data provider */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website of the data provider */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("provider_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_agreements" (
  "agreement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each agreement */,
  "provider_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data provider */,
  "agency_id" INTEGER /* ID of the agency */,
  "agreement_date" TEXT /* Date the agreement was made */,
  "terms" TEXT /* Terms of the agreement */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the agreement */,
  "renewal_date" TEXT /* Date when the agreement can be renewed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("agreement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_agreements_provider_id FOREIGN KEY ("provider_id") REFERENCES data_providers ("provider_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_agreements_agency_id FOREIGN KEY ("agency_id") REFERENCES agency ("agency_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "agency" (
  "agency_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the agency */,
  "agency_name" TEXT /* Name of the agency */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the agency */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email of the agency */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the agency */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website of the agency */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("agency_id")
)
